facts.claim: Discover Celebrity Millennium. View the award-winning luxury cruise ship's deck plan, staterooms, dining options, things to do and upcoming sailings.
GTS Celebrity Millennium is a Millennium-class cruise ship operated by Celebrity Cruises, a subsidiary of Royal Caribbean Group.
As the lead ship of her namesake class, all of whom are powered by gas turbines, she was delivered in 2000 and is the oldest operating ship in Celebrity's fleet.
